classification_rationale: This release promotes ProductOS to V14.0.0 after the v14 intent-driven architecture passed Ralph-loop inspection, validation, fix, and revalidation.
summary: ProductOS V14.0.0 is the stable release for v14 intent-driven architecture.
upgrade_actions: Adopt the promoted V14 intent-driven architecture in the current ProductOS operating flow.
Use the automatic Ralph-gated release promotion command for future successful slices.
Keep product-specific work outside shared repo surfaces and promote only reusable repo assets.
